---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or change
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / Motivation

What gap or risk does this address? Cite an ADR (`docs/decisions.md`) if the
feature touches a locked or open decision.

## Proposed approach

How would you implement this? Reference the affected ABC(s) in
`src/superconducted/interfaces.py`. If you'd add a new ABC, justify it.

## Affected interfaces / modules

- ABC(s):
- Module(s):

## ADR needed?

- [ ] Yes — draft attached or referenced.
- [ ] No — explain why this fits within an existing ADR.

## Acceptance criteria

What does "done" look like? Tests added, docs updated, benchmark numbers, etc.
